历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 16619 → 16363 → 20043 → 25632 → 26800, showing a continuous backward shift (larger ranking numbers indicate increased competition), with a cumulative backward shift of about 10181 positions over the past 4 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 26800, with an annual backward shift of about 1100–1200 positions in the last 2 years, indicating a clear downward trend; the enrollment plan for this university in Chongqing Physics Category was 120 in 2021, 122 in 2022, 123 in 2023, 123 in 2024, 127 in 2025, and 127 in 2026, with the plan remaining stable from 2025 to 2026, showing no signs of expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; the Soft Science main ranking has been rising continuously: 53rd in 2021 → 51st in 2022 → 46th in 2023 → 50th in 2024 → 50th in 2025 → 44th in 2026, with stable improvement in recent years, indicating recognition of the university's comprehensive strength; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving school management responses and campus safety public opinion, but the number of incidents is limited and the school responded promptly; Douyin heat total ranking 8th (high heat), comprehensive heat about 5.85 million, short video exposure high, indicating high application attention; the 2025 reputation is slightly negative, mainly involving abnormal admission score signals (low-score admissions in provinces like Heilongjiang), but no obvious gaps were seen locally in Chongqing; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Zhengzhou University has few A- and above disciplines (data not included), with overall discipline strength mainly at B+ and below, but as a comprehensive 211 university, disciplines such as Clinical Medicine, Materials Science and Engineering, and Chemistry have some accumulation.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, pushing up competition in related major groups; the estimated number of Physics Category examinees in Chongqing in 2026 is about 136,895 (calculated based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 65.5%), a decrease of about 2,583 from 139,478 in 2025, showing a slight decline in total examinees; the provincial control line was 425 in 2025 and 427 in 2024, basically stable; Zhengzhou University is located in Zhengzhou, Henan, far from Chongqing, and is not a local university; the university's enrollment proportion in Chongqing is not high (127 Physics Category students in 2025 out of about 140,000 Physics Category examinees in Chongqing), making it a cross-provincial enrollment, with limited regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward shift trend of historical rankings, the stable enrollment plan for 2026, the slight decrease in Physics Category examinees in Chongqing, the rise in Soft Science ranking, and the high Douyin attention, it is expected that competition in 2026 will slightly ease but the downward inertia remains; based on the 2025 baseline of 26800, the predicted minimum ranking is about 27000, with a range of 26500–27500.
